/usr/bin/c++  -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/SceneRTXTester.dir/Source/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/SceneRTXTester.dir/Source/Common/SceneMetaLoader.cpp.o CMakeFiles/SceneRTXTester.dir/Source/Common/BVHBuilder.cpp.o CMakeFiles/SceneRTXTester.dir/Source/Common/Camera.cpp.o CMakeFiles/SceneRTXTester.dir/Source/Common/OBJLoader.cpp.o CMakeFiles/SceneRTXTester.dir/Source/Common/Renderer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/SceneRTXTester.dir/Source/Common/RenderManager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/SceneRTXTester.dir/Source/Common/Scene.cpp.o CMakeFiles/SceneRTXTester.dir/Source/Common/SceneLoader.cpp.o CMakeFiles/SceneRTXTester.dir/Source/Common/SceneLoaderFactory.cpp.o CMakeFiles/SceneRTXTester.dir/Source/Common/SceneObject.cpp.o CMakeFiles/SceneRTXTester.dir/Source/Common/SceneJSONLoader.cpp.o CMakeFiles/SceneRTXTester.dir/Source/macOSSpecific/MetalRenderer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/SceneRTXTester.dir/Source/macOSSpecific/MetalRenderer.mm.o -o SceneRTXTester  -framework Metal -framework Foundation -framework AppKit -framework MetalKit
